name: LG_123_CLCARD_GrupŞirketKodu_Trigger
definition:
CREATE TRIGGER [dbo].[LG_123_CLCARD_GrupŞirketKodu_Trigger] ON [dbo].[LG_123_CLCARD]
AFTER UPDATE
as begin

DECLARE @LOGICALREF int
DECLARE @CYPHCODE nvarchar(51)

SELECT @LOGICALREF=I.LOGICALREF,@CYPHCODE=I.CYPHCODE FROM INSERTED I

IF (@CYPHCODE='127')
BEGIN 
	UPDATE LG_123_CLCARD SET CYPHCODE='',PARENTCLREF=6 WHERE LOGICALREF=@LOGICALREF
END
END
